programmes.show_description: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
British crime thriller starring Luke Mably and Steven Berkoff. A football hooligan turned gangland hard man attempts to regain a foothold in the Essex underworld. (2016)
Drug smugglers, boozed-up brawls on the sea front and beach raves that get out of hand, plus thieving seagulls and ice cream wars - all Caught on Camera.
Clip show of dramatic confrontations, presented by George Lamb. The increasingly popular dashboard camera is capturing incidents of road rage on video.
In a link-up with another US sitcom, Mad About You, Rachel and Monica squabble over two handsome doctors.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.

Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Monica meets the woman who has been using her credit card number to do all the things that she herself wishes she could do. Ross faces a tough decision.
Monica develops a mature approach to her latest love, a younger man, and Ross is mistaken for a male prostitute when he buys a new pager.
When Ross's ex-wife gives birth, he and Susan almost miss the event. Joey befriends a pregnant woman.
Chandler lets slip that Ross has secretly been in love with Rachel since ninth grade.
Graeme Hall tackles a terrier obsessed with its owner's glasses, a German Shepherd who grabs hold of his tail at any given opportunity, and eight Chihuahuas that need toilet training.
Graeme Hall tackles a retriever with bad breath, thanks to its preferred all-you-can-eat buffet from the dog poo bin. And Coco goes loco over inanimate objects when out for walks.
Frenchie Bingo is stopping Alan from finding romance. Can Graeme Hall help Alan find love? And Cockerpoo Molly cries at the top of her voice. Sleep deprived mum Amy is at her wit's end.
Road crime cops Nick Lovatt and Mark Scott from Derbyshire's Specialist ANPR crime unit target drug dealers coming into the county from other areas.
In Derbyshire, the cops are forced to make a dramatic stop during a race to stop burglars. And some stolen property turns up in an unusual place.
Jim responds to an urgent call for backup from a colleague, who is surrounded by an angry mob following a report of an agressive young man's dangerous driving.
Teaming up with neighbouring forces under Operation Fuego Derbyshire's police chase a getaway driver on a 120mph rampage.
Gordo and Dan unleash their tasers to help arrest a knife-wielding teenager, and Jim leads five units to box in a car suspected of carrying drugs.
Cases include a raid on a suspected drug user whose door won't budge, a chase after a souped-up hot hatch and a late-night reveller in Nantwich town centre.
The Interceptors come under attack from a gang of violent, armed robbers, and the boys in the 'Big Blue Van' respond to reports of bottles raining down on the streets.
Interceptor Jim heads up a raid for a suspected drug dealer, and Dan and 'Gordy' respond to reports of an alleyway attack.
In this drama-documentary we get privileged access inside the courtroom when, 27 years after a 17-year-old was found dead, Steve Wright pleaded guilty to the murder.
...Victim? Pt. 2. A violent confrontation sees a grandfather shoot and kill his estranged wife's partner.
When gifts go missing, Stacy Ferrance blames the kids - but a dirty footprint leads her to a shocking surprise. And a pair of students find they have a roommate they didn't know about. (Ep3)
A turbulent romance between Kamilla Ahmad and Tai O'Donnell ends in bloodshed as obsession and control escalate to a deadly level.
Dr Magnus Lynch tackles twin lipomas nicknamed Barry and Barbara, and a Welsh carpet fitter needs Dr Dev Shah to help him with 'devil horns'; large cysts on either side of his head.
It's another gruelling shift for team at Barnsley Hospital's Casualty Department. Juggling a back-log of walk-in patients and a constant stream of new ambulance emergencies.
Jacko is on the hunt for a wanted teenager, and the interceptors are hot on the heels of a stolen silver Micra.

We join Beckii and Simon on a big day as the newest member of their family is coming home after weeks in the hospital. We also follow Natalie Birkett, who sells candy floss.
We join Yorkshire lads and cousins John and Jamie down at Fuengirola market. Caravan living Clint Valentine is also looking for some extra money working at a bar.
Graeme Hall tackles seemingly immoveable 60-kilo mountain dog Oakley whose obstinance leads to traffic jams when he plonks himself in the middle of the road.
Derbyshire police pursue criminals on the run, a suspect flees on foot, and there's a high-speed cross-border pursuit as a wanted man refuses to stop. Hosted by Jamie Theakston.
A fast and dangerous driver pushes the Traffic Cops to the limits, reaching speeds of over 150 mph. Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston.
Police stop an out-of-control driver whose passenger is a child without a seat belt. And there are tragic consequences when speed kills. Jamie Theakston presents.
In this special episode, the interceptor's take on the young and reckless who cause carnage on our roads and put themselves and others in danger.
The pursuit of a white van tearing up the turf proves to be a family affair, and a two-year-old German shepherd cross named Titan earns his spurs.
Dog handler Darren calls on all his powers of persuasion to try and end a rooftop stand-off, and Steve is forced to use his pepper spray on a suspect.

programmes.show_name: Shoplifters & Scammers: At War With The Law
programmes.show_description: As a store in Stafford packs up for the day, two supposed late-night shoppers distract the staff whilst two other women enter and start filling bags with pharmaceuticals.
Justin's ready for John to move on. Will Remi listen to his doctor? Sonny remains powerless.
John accepts his limitations. Remi makes a decision. Sonny puts his friend first.
Observational series. Dr Claire Taylor offers comfort to Gohar, a partially-sighted lady whose eyes were severely damaged by a chemical burn when she was a child.
After a quiet start to the day, the staff at Barnsley casualty treat John who has hit is head falling at home and seven month old Elisa is treated in paediatrics.
Paramedics rush a man to hospital after a grisly circular saw incident; an air ambulance helps a man crushed under a great weight.
In Belfast's Royal Victoria A&E, a drunken patient sparks chaos in the waiting room, while in East London doctors race to save a young woman who arrives in suspected anaphylactic shock.
Dr Emma helps a village hall manager to look lump-free ready for her 40th birthday party; Dr Natalia digs out a cyst to give her patient a smooth back for a holiday to Egypt.
